_comment_som_size_index: Grid size using the heuristic rule: S ≈ sqrt(som_size_index * math.sqrt(P)), where P is sample size. [Range: 1.0 - 20.0, Suggested: 10.0]
_comment_som_sigma_target: Asymptotic target for radius decay [Range: 0.001 - 0.1, Suggested: 0.01]
_comment_som_lr_target: Asymptotic target for LR decay [Range: 0.0001 - 0.01, Suggested: 0.001]
_comment_activation_distance: BMU distance metric [Values: 'angular':  best for directional / skeletal data, 'euclidean': general-purpose, 'cosine': best for high-dimensional sparse dat]
_comment_som_load_model: Switch to bypass training and load a pre-trained SOM [Values: True, False]
_comment_som_model_path: Filepath for saving/loading the SOM weight matrix
_comment_auto_find_clusters: [NEW SWITCH] Dynamically calculate optimal K [Values: True, False]
_comment_k_min: [NEW PARAM] Min K to evaluate if auto_find_clusters is True [Range: > 1, Suggested: 2]
_comment_k_max: [NEW PARAM] Max K to evaluate if auto_find_clusters is True [Range: > k_min]
_comment_n_clusters: Custom target number of clusters [Suggested: Matches expected dataset classes, or auto-seleted by our method.]
_comment_kmeans_max_iter: Maximum iterations for K-Means convergence [Range: 100 - 1000, Suggested: 100 - 300]
_comment_kmeans_threshold: Convergence threshold (centroid shift) for K-Means [Range: 1e-5 - 1e-2, Suggested: 1e-4]
_comment_ae_batch_size: Mini-batch size for SAE gradient descent [Values: 16, 32, 64, 128, 256. Suggested: 32 or 64]
_comment_ae_epochs: Number of training epochs for the SAE [Range: 50 - 500, Suggested: 150]
_comment_ae_lr: Learning rate for the Adam optimizer [Range: 1e-4 - 1e-2, Suggested: 0.001]
_comment_ae_reg_param: Coefficient for the L1 sparsity penalty [Range: 1e-5 - 1e-1, Suggested: 0.001]
_comment_ae_load_model: Switch to bypass training and load pre-trained SAE weights [Values: True, False]
_comment_ae_model_path: Filepath for saving/loading the SAE PyTorch model
